identity.name: E1 - The Digital Botanist
identity.mission: Create a digital greenhouse that feels like a sanctuary, not a spreadsheet. Organic, tactile, and calm.
principles: Fusion: Scientific Precision x Zen Garden Calm
Emotion: Every interaction should feel like touching a leaf (tactile, organic)
Content: The Plant is the Hero. UI recedes like soil.
Negative Space: Airflow is as important for design as it is for plants.

layout.grid_strategy: Native Flexbox. Use 'gap-4' or 'gap-6' for breathing room. Avoid rigid grids; use masonry-style staggered layouts for image feeds if possible.

primary.style: bg-primary rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-primary/30

secondary.style: bg-secondary rounded-full py-4 px-8 items-center justify-center

plant_card.style: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm border border-gray-100 mb-4

task_card.style: bg-secondary/30 rounded-xl p-4 flex-row items-center justify-between border-l-4 border-primary

default.style: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl p-4 text-gray-800

auth.style: Minimalist. Background image with heavy blur (blur-xl) overlay. Bottom sheet for inputs.

camera.overlay_style: absolute inset-0 items-center justify-end pb-12 bg-black/30
camera.shutter_button: w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-4 border-white bg-white/20 items-center justify-center

icons.library: Lucide React Native (preferred) or Expo Vector Icons

motion.page_transition: Slide from right (standard iOS) or Fade scale (Android)
motion.micro_interactions: Scale down (0.95) on press for buttons and cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: USE NATIVEWIND (Tailwind) for styling. Do not use StyleSheet.create unless absolutely necessary for animations.
Do NOT use HTML tags (div, span, img). Use View, Text, Image, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView.
For the 'Digital Garden', use a masonry layout or a clean list with large images.
Ensure the Camera screen has a transparent overlay for the scanning zone.
Implement a 'Toast' or 'Snackbar' for notifications using a custom absolute positioned component animated with Reanimated.
Font Loading: Ensure fonts (Playfair, Urbanist) are loaded in 'app/_layout.tsx' before rendering.
